svg.title: RAG pipeline flowchart
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing the 8 stages of a PDF-based RAG pipeline, from upload to chat output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PDF upload stage in a RAG pipeline')
sendPrompt('How does text extraction work from PDFs?')
sendPrompt('What is recursive chunking and why is it used?')
sendPrompt('How do OpenAI embeddings turn text into vectors?')
sendPrompt('What is a FAISS vector index and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('How does semantic retrieval find relevant chunks?')
sendPrompt('How does GPT generate a response from retrieved context?')
sendPrompt('How is the chat interface output delivered to the user?')
